title: xMEMS unveils super tiny cooling fan that fits inside smart glasses - Engadget
summary: Specifically engineered to fit inside a smart glasses temple arm, as well as inside AR and XR glasses, this tiny fan was built on xMEMS' µCooling platform . The XMC-1200 measures just 46mm², which makes it possible to integrate into tight spots.
caption: output/2026-07-21/xmems-unveils-super-tiny-cooling-fan-that-fits-inside-smart-glasses-en.txt
